name: medical clinics processing 10–20 patients/day tool
description: For medical clinics processing 10–20 patients/day, inefficient data analysis causes delayed decision-making. We provide streamlined analytics instead of manual data entry and analysis using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient patient data analysis leading to delayed decision-making.
